artifacts.summary: Modal witness data structure and helpers (sorry-free)
Documents why singleton saturation fails; provides helper lemmas
Implementation summary documenting blocker and partial progress

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 complete (ModalWitnessData.lean sorry-free). Phase 2-4 blocked due to fundamental flaw in design: singleton BFMCS cannot satisfy modal saturation. Multi-family approach required.

verification.failure_reason: Design flaw: singleton bundle is not modally saturated. Diamond(psi) in MCS does not imply psi in MCS.

review_reason: Task 1002 design is fundamentally flawed. Singleton BFMCS cannot satisfy modal saturation. Need new approach using multi-family bundle with different mcs functions per family.

blocker_details.description: The is_modally_saturated predicate requires: Diamond(psi) in fam.mcs t implies psi in some fam'.mcs t. For singleton where all families share mcs t = t.world, this requires Diamond(psi) -> psi in every MCS, which is false in S5 modal logic.
blocker_details.recommendation: Implement multi-family BFMCS where witness families have different mcs assignments. Each witness family must satisfy temporal coherence (forward_G, backward_H).
